goal: Track consolidated responses for PR #7140 automation pass
modification: Record auditable response items with html_url and FIXED vs CONSIDERED outcomes for every non-author top-level comment processed by /commentreply.
necessity: Required by the PR automation trigger so outstanding reviewer feedback and process comments are traceable without posting individual replies.
integration_proof: Stored under the existing automation/jleechanorg_pr_automation/responses path used for PR automation response manifests and mirrored into /tmp/worldarchitect.ai/work/copilot/responses.json for /commentreply execution.
